frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields present and valid; allowed-tools hyphenated; description 928 chars (under 1024); all composes_with and 8 spawned_by targets exist.

description_quality.notes: 928 chars; pushy with 8+ trigger phrases and exclusions; starts with 'Use' (could be sharper action verb).

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 171 lines; no references needed for this compact protocol skill.

instruction_clarity.notes: Imperative voice; four-step protocol; token-cost table gives WHY; three escalation branches; anti-patterns table.

coordination.notes: All 3 composes_with and all 8 spawned_by targets exist; non-agent skill so no ownership conflicts.

completeness.notes: All cross-references resolve; three deployment patterns covered (in-repo, external, multi-cluster).

anti_patterns.notes: No hardcoded paths; MUST/NEVER not abused; anti-pattern table explains WHY; self-aware about alternative layouts.
